title: Make Something Real with AI
synopsis: You've been given one week, one AI tool, and one brief â create something that matters to you. This course drops you into a real creative challenge where every decision about how to use AI shapes the final result, and teaches you when to trust the machine and when to take back control.
rationale: Teenagers are already using generative AI tools for creative work but lack structured frameworks for thinking about authorship, quality control, and ethical use, leaving them vulnerable to both poor outputs and academic integrity issues.
learning_outcome: Students can plan, execute, and critically evaluate a creative project made in collaboration with an AI tool, articulating which decisions they made themselves and why those choices define the work as their own.
